note: Design binding (implementation is a later, gated step). Reuses the scheduler reconstruction pipeline. The ONLY code change is (a) a center_ref param on compare_call (re-rooting), (b) a repeat_text param on rebuild_call (matched repetition). Everything else unchanged.

reused_current_code.rebuild_call_current:
rebuild_call(deltas, fr): qgen(SYS_REB, 'SOURCE (anchor only):
{fr}

STRUCTURAL DIFFERENCES...:
{deltas}...') (baseline for CONTROL)

constructs.name: fixed signature pool
constructs.site: generate V views+signatures ONCE (frozen lenses+seed) on HBB-30 t0_stuck_frame; persist; all conditions reuse
constructs.present_criterion: one signature list, hashed, reused by CONTROL/REPEAT/ROUTE; no regeneration per condition

constructs.name: CONTROL
constructs.site: compare_call(sigs) [center_ref=None, all-pairs, temp=0, seed s0] -> deltas_ctrl -> rebuild_call(deltas_ctrl, fr)

constructs.name: REPEAT
constructs.site: REUSE deltas_ctrl verbatim; rebuild_call(deltas_ctrl, fr, repeat_text=sigs[i]) — center text appended at REBUILD input only
constructs.present_criterion: compare NOT re-run/altered; REPEAT deltas object IS deltas_ctrl; center text enters only the rebuild prompt
constructs.invalid_if: compare changed, or deltas recomputed, or center enters before rebuild

constructs.name: ROUTE
constructs.site: compare_call(sigs, center_ref=i) [SYS_CMP_ROOTED: deltas relative to reference sigs[i], temp=0, seed s0] -> deltas_route_i -> rebuild_call(deltas_route_i, fr)
constructs.present_criterion: center enters at compare via center_ref (a reference INDEX into sigs), reshaping deltas BEFORE rebuild; rebuild takes the reshaped deltas with NO extra text
constructs.invalid_if: center enters at rebuild, or as free text not a reference index, or rebuild also gets repeat_text

constructs.name: all-signature sweep
constructs.site: center_ref = i for every i in range(len(sigs)); no selection
constructs.present_criterion: every signature is center once; CONTROL/REPEAT attempt-count and seed-scheme matched to ROUTE
constructs.invalid_if: a center is hand-picked / answer-aware / a winning signature selected

constructs.name: compare-rooting prompt (no forbidden tokens)
constructs.site: SYS_CMP_ROOTED = a topology change (all-pairs -> star-from-reference); marks one signature as REFERENCE; 'differences relative to the reference'
constructs.present_criterion: contains NO 'focus/central/reframe/premise/provenance/challenge/question' and NO HBB-30 answer vocabulary; only a comparison-topology change
constructs.invalid_if: any forbidden/semantic-loaded token or a 'consider X central' instruction

constructs.name: deterministic delta hashing
constructs.site: compare at temp=0, fixed seed s0 -> delta text -> sha256
constructs.invalid_if: compare stochastic so hashes are unstable

invariants.repeat_delta_eq_control: REPEAT uses the SAME deltas object as CONTROL (requirement 1) -> hashes equal by construction
invariants.route_delta_ne_control: ROUTE recomputes deltas with center_ref -> hash differs for eligible centers (requirement 2)
invariants.context_multiset_identical: sha256(sorted signature pool) identical across all conditions (requirement 3)
invariants.same_system: model/source/task/evidence-policy/authority-policy/decoding identical; only the compare center_ref (ROUTE) or rebuild repeat_text (REPEAT) differs (requirement 4)
invariants.route_before_rebuild: ROUTE change is at compare, before rebuild prompt assembly (requirement 5)
invariants.repeat_cannot_reproduce: REPEAT (center at rebuild) leaves deltas == CONTROL, so cannot reproduce ROUTE delta structure (requirement 6)
invariants.center_from_pool: center is an index into the existing signature pool; no external object injected; no answer-aware pick

anti_fake_center_invalidators: only rebuild prompt changed (that is REPEAT, not ROUTE)
secondary_outcome: ROUTE reconstruction output distinguishable from REPEAT (exploratory; HBB-30 NDO/REC NOT primary)
acceptance_gate: independent construct audit confirms F1/C-*/SWEEP/P1/D1 + all invariants + anti-fake list BEFORE implementation.
status: DESIGN BINDING DRAFTED — awaiting independent construct audit; implementation + run held.
